messages.settings.title: Settings
messages.settings.subtitle: Personalize how this app works
messages.settings.placeholder.model: Open the list to fetch models, or type one
messages.popup.error.tauriUnavailable: Tauri API is unavailable; run this in the desktop app
messages.settings.description.startup: Control the behavior of the application when it starts up with the system and closes the main window.
messages.settings.description.launchAtLogin: This application will automatically run in the background after logging in to the system.
messages.settings.description.startMinimized: Do not display the main window when starting, only keep the tray icon.
messages.settings.description.showTrayIcon: The main window cannot be evoked through the tray after closing.
messages.settings.description.closeBehavior: Select the default behavior when closing the main window.
messages.settings.description.windowPolicy: The pre-created strategy for translating pop-up windows and screenshot overlays will take effect after restarting the application.
messages.settings.description.popupPrecreate: Create a translation window when starting, and the word typing response will be faster.
messages.settings.description.overlayPrecreate: Create a screenshot overlay at startup, and the screenshot OCR response will be faster.
messages.settings.description.appearance: Set the theme and interface language.
messages.settings.description.theme: Determine the color style of the main window and settings page.
messages.settings.description.interfaceLanguage: It takes effect immediately after selection.
messages.settings.description.update: Set the acquisition channels and detection behavior of the new version.
messages.settings.description.updateChannel: The Beta channel gets features earlier, but may not be as stable.
messages.settings.description.defaultLanguages: Set the default language for word strokes, screenshots and clipboard translations.
messages.settings.description.defaultSourceLangua: After setting, it will no longer be automatically detected during translation.
messages.settings.description.defaultTargetLangua: Can be temporarily switched during translation.
messages.settings.description.autoDetectLanguage: Enabled when the source language cannot be determined.
messages.settings.description.translationBehavior: Control translation behavior such as clipboard.
messages.settings.description.autoCopy: Copy the translation to the clipboard after the translation is completed.
messages.settings.description.restoreClipboard: Restore the original clipboard content after translation.
messages.settings.description.lookupHistory: Adjust word retrieval and history settings.
messages.settings.description.historyLimit: Old records that exceed the upper limit will be automatically cleared.
messages.settings.description.globalShortcuts: Press the key combination to record, Esc to cancel; also available when the application is not focused.
messages.settings.description.appShortcuts: Only takes effect when this application window is focused.
messages.settings.description.shortcutConflicts: The following shortcut keys are occupied by the system or other applications.
messages.settings.status.autoSaveDescription: Modifications will take effect immediately and automatically saved
messages.settings.status.offline: System-level service, cannot be turned off
messages.settings.status.systemService: Enabled, a self-test will be performed after translation
messages.settings.status.reflectionEnabled: Close by default, after enabling, the quality is more stable but the response is slower
messages.settings.button.disableReflection: Verify whether the Key is valid
messages.settings.tooltip.retryValidation: Failed to open the language pack directory
messages.settings.toast.openLanguageDirectoryFail: Please select or enter a new channel name
messages.settings.placeholder.channel: For example: local Ollama / company internal agent
messages.settings.combobox.createChannel: Please enter or select the channel
messages.settings.combobox.chooseModel: Recognize and translate after selecting the screen area.
messages.settings.shortcut.recordingAria: The translation results are displayed when the cursor is hovering.
messages.settings.shortcut.translate-screenshot.d: Set local log level and export logs.
messages.settings.shortcut.word-lookup.label: Debug level will generate a lot of logs.
messages.settings.shortcut.word-lookup.descriptio: Package the last 7 days’ logs for feedback.
messages.settings.shortcut.open-settings.label: Anonymous statistics do not include translated content and API Keys.
messages.settings.shortcut.open-settings.descript: It will take effect after restarting.
messages.settings.group.data: Export JSON settings without API Key.
messages.settings.group.about: Restore settings from JSON, API Key will not be overwritten.
messages.settings.group.aboutService: Restore default settings, the operation cannot be undone.
messages.settings.description.logging: Clear all customizations and API Keys.
messages.settings.description.logLevel: View current version and build information.
messages.settings.description.exportLogs: Learn about the new capabilities and fixes in the version.
messages.settings.description.privacy: View the source code and submit feedback.
messages.settings.description.data: Recommend this app to your friends.
messages.settings.field.exportConfig: This operation will clear the translation service, shortcut keys and personalization options and cannot be restored.
messages.settings.field.resetAll: Do not generate inference process, fastest response
messages.settings.field.homepage: Full reasoning, suitable for complex text
messages.settings.field.recommend: Please enter the API Key first
messages.settings.dialog.resetDescription: Please fill in the Endpoint first
messages.settings.description.reasoningOff: The service provider did not return the model, you can enter it manually
messages.settings.description.reasoningMedium: Confirm to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
messages.settings.description.reasoningLong: Select a channel. Multiple instances can be created for the same channel.
messages.settings.toast.apiKeyRequired: This service does not require an API Key
messages.settings.toast.pullFailed: An API Key needs to be filled in
messages.settings.toast.endpointRequired: Windows Media OCR is always enabled
messages.settings.toast.emptyModels: Custom OCR service is not yet open
messages.settings.toast.emptyModelsDescription: Large language model translation, supports custom inference depth
messages.settings.description.addService: Windows.Media.Ocr · The system comes with it and is always available
messages.settings.empty.noMatchingServices: Windows 10+ system comes with its own OCR engine and does not need to be installed.
messages.settings.tooltip.noApiKeyRequired: Optical character recognition implementation currently used in Windows
messages.settings.tooltip.apiKeyRequired: Whether an Internet connection is required to complete recognition
messages.settings.tooltip.ocrAlwaysEnabled: Whether a key needs to be configured
messages.settings.tooltip.customOcrUnavailable: Whether it is allowed to deactivate the engine
messages.settings.description.networkRequirement: Supports printed Chinese, English, Japanese and Korean, Simplified and Traditional Chinese and 60+ languages
messages.settings.description.canDisable: Low recognition rate for complex layouts, handwriting and low-contrast content
messages.settings.field.networkRequirement: Software UI, menus, web pages, documents and simple layout images
messages.settings.field.canDisable: Windows system provides · Always available · No network required · Instant recognition
messages.settings.description.ocrCapabilities: The full address of the OpenAI compatible protocol.
messages.settings.ocr.commonCapabilities: Used to call {name}, only stored locally.
messages.settings.ocr.languages: Open the drop-down model, or enter it directly.
messages.settings.ocr.limitationsTitle: Can be temporarily overwritten when called.
messages.settings.ocr.limitations: Control the depth of reasoning before the model answers.
messages.settings.ocr.useCasesTitle: Set rules for the AI’s role, tone, and terminology.
messages.settings.ocr.useCases: Translation template, supports source_lang, target_lang and text placeholders.
messages.settings.ocr.footer: Post-translation self-checking and improvement will increase time consumption.
messages.settings.description.protocol: Add easy-to-remember notes to custom instances.
messages.settings.description.endpoint: Deactivate and clear the instance configuration and cannot be restored.
messages.settings.description.defaultModel: The API Key is not configured and the instance cannot be used for translation.
messages.history.trigger.selection: The record has no copyable text
messages.history.filter.all: Please check the clipping Postboard permissions | | | Failed to clear translation history | | | Re-translation requested | | | Default model | | | Reading failed | | | This record has no original text to read | | | This record has no translation to read | | | There are no records filtered by "{filter}"
messages.history.loading: Switch to other methods or view all records.
messages.history.copyFailed: Select a conversation from the left to view details
messages.history.sourceCopied: This operation is irreversible and all history will be permanently deleted.
messages.history.noSourceToSpeak: The record has no original text to read
messages.history.noResultToSpeak: The record has no translation to read
messages.history.filterEmpty: There are no records under the "{filter}" filter
messages.history.filterEmptyDescription: Switch to other methods or view all records.
messages.history.selectSession: Select a conversation from the left to view details
messages.history.clearDescription: This operation is irreversible and all history will be permanently deleted.
